! Title: ShieldNova - Services / Netflix
! Description: Domain set for Netflix traffic routing.
! Author: Harry (https://github.com/harryheros)
! Homepage: https://github.com/harryheros/shieldnova
! License: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0
! Built: 2026-04-23 09:23:49 UTC
! Total: 8

! ============================================================================
! ShieldNova - Services / Netflix
! Domain set for routing Netflix traffic through proxy nodes.
! ============================================================================

||netflix.com^                            ! Netflix - main platform
||netflix.net^                            ! Netflix - CDN infrastructure
||nflxvideo.net^                          ! Netflix - video delivery
||nflximg.net^                            ! Netflix - image assets
||nflximg.com^                            ! Netflix - image assets (alt)
||nflxext.com^                            ! Netflix - browser extension
||nflxso.net^                             ! Netflix - streaming optimization
||fast.com^                               ! Netflix - speed test tool
